series_metadata.series_description: Pursuant to R.C. 113.05, the Treasurer of State is required to hold in its custody a copy of the evidence of title for depository-ineligible assets owned by the funds for which the Treasurer acts as statutory custodian.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain evidence of title onsite for duration for which fund owns the asset; upon disposition of asset, retain copy of evidence of title onsite for remainder of current fiscal year and for 2 additional fiscal years., Electronic: Delete
